description: 3 symptoms of the same root cause: Postgres connection pool exhausted. Should form 1 cluster.

alerts.text: PostgreSQL connection pool exhausted: all 100 connections in use, new requests queuing. Database CPU at 94%.
API gateway returning 503 errors: upstream database timeout after 30 seconds. sqlalchemy QueuePool limit reached.
Worker service retry storm: 847 failed DB queries in last 5 minutes, retrying with exponential backoff. Postgres max_connections hit.
